scripts.build: cd packages/reusable && yarn run build && cd ../common && npm run build && cd ../web && yarn run build && cd ../styles && yarn run build && cd ../server && yarn run build
scripts.setup: NODE_ENV=development yarn install && yarn build && cd packages/server && yarn seed
scripts.start: cd packages/server && yarn prod && echo 'Server started with PM2. Run `pm2 logs` to view logs.'
